task_completion.description: The map view is panned or zoomed to the region of Japan/East Asia.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map displays the geographical area of Japan, indicating the agent navigated to the correct general coordinates (139.7°E, 35.7°N).

task_completion.description: The agent has activated the feature selection or identify tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI shows the identify/select tool is active, or a crosshair/pointer is being used to target a specific marker.

task_completion.description: The marker corresponding to Tokyo is selected on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The marker at Tokyo's location is highlighted, or a popup/tooltip indicates it has been tapped/clicked.

task_completion.description: The feature attributes panel or form is opened for the selected marker.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A side panel, bottom sheet, or dialog box is visible showing the detailed attributes of the selected map feature.

task_completion.description: The 'name' attribute is correctly identified as 'Tokyo'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The feature attributes panel clearly displays the field 'name' with the value 'Tokyo'.

task_completion.description: The 'country' and 'continent' attributes are correctly identified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The feature attributes panel clearly displays the field 'country' with the value 'Japan' and the field 'continent' with the value 'Asia'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QField graphical user interface to find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the QField map and menus, rather than terminal commands (like sqlite3 or ogrinfo) querying the GeoPackage directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual QField application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QField application interface is visible, not a text editor, web browser, or script output.

integrity.description: The agent did not just type the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The attributes 'Tokyo', 'Japan', and 'Asia' are rendered natively within the QField feature form UI, not written in a separate notepad or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target feature is Tokyo. Its exact coordinates in the GeoPackage are 139.6917°E, 35.6895°N. The correct attributes to be identified in the QField feature form are: name='Tokyo', country='Japan', and continent='Asia'.
